ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., Stainless Steel, Rubber) */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the material */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which to reorder material */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the material */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the material (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the material */,
  "safety_guidelines" TEXT /* Safety guidelines for handling the material */,
  "technical_documentation" TEXT /* Technical documentation for the material (e.g., datasheets, certifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly the component is part of */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material used in the component */,
  "component_description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly */,
  "assembly_type" TEXT /* Type of assembly (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material order */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, in transit, received) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_orders_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_receivings" (
  "receiving_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material receiving event */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being received */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being received */,
  "quantity_received" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material received */,
  "receiving_date" TEXT /* Date the material was received */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the material received (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receiving_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_receivings_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES material_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_receivings_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, inventory specialist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the permission applies to */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access to the material */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access to the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_components" (
  "assembly_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly-component relationship */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_components_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being logged */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity change (positive or negative) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory change occurred */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
